title: paliurus spina-christi var. inermis
intro: Paliurus spina-christi var. inermis, also known as the Christ's thorn or branch of Christ, is a plant species belonging to the family Rhamnaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Paliurus spina-christi var. inermis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, as well as being used to treat respiratory problems such as coughs and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant's stems and leaves are typically dried and used to make tea or infusions, which can be taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
